title: Mouse Buttons Close Inventory
description: Fixes a Minecraft Bug that prevents closing the inventory when bound to a mouse button
body:
Minecraft allows you to rebind the "Open/Close Inventory" key to a mouse button - however doing so will allow you to only open your inventory with that button, not close it.

 

This is a fix for that for Forge versions of Minecraft.

 

A Fabric version exists already here.

 

The Minecraft bug has existed for nearly ten years. The most recent tracker is MC-156810
